text.title: BA Methodologies Detail Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the methodologies-detail methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Steerco prep KA-4 → FRS-0003 selects current-state + future-state + risk-analysis → templates emitted; SME fills; reviewer signs off; commit tagged steerco-2026Q2.
